list.tooltip:
Health Point.
If this reaches 0, character will become unconscious
If it reaches negative Constitution score, character dies.
Temporary injury will decrese score, permanent injury will decrease maximum.
Maximum score is 10 + CON Modifier + others.
Naturally recovers during sleep.

Mana Point, required for casting spells.
Maximum score is 0 + PSY Modifier + others.
Naturally recovers during sleep or rest.

Energy, consumed when performing mental activity.
Formula: WIL Score * 10 + others
Naturally recovers during sleep or rest.
When value falls below Stress Threshold, character's Mood will decrease by 1 step
When value reaches 0, character's Mood will decrease by 2 step

Stamina, consumed when performing physical activity.
Calculation: CON Score * 10 + others
Naturally recovers during sleep.
When value falls below Fatigue Threshold, character will become Fatigued (increase stamina expenditure).
When value reaches 0, character will become Exhausted (decrease stamina recovery).
